text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure what it is, but I get the sense Mejiro
Ardan isn't feeling herself today...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Oh... I see you can tell something's wrong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Truthfully, I awoke with a mild headache this
morning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's no cause for concern, though. I've
experienced much worse than—Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your concern, Trainer. I shall see
whether my condition improves before I resume
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan forces a smile, but the headache
continues to bother her for some time.
